name: tkn-codex-context-engineering
description: Preserve and resume Codex working context, session notes, decisions, and user-global context across chats and repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain and resume working context, session notes, decisions, and global Codex context
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin that groups context engineering skills and scripts for repository working context, session notes, session resume, decision records, decision review, and explicit import or promotion of user-global context through ~/.codex-context.
defaultPrompt: Promote this session's reusable learning globally
